category_sources: Official ghz documentation describes ghz as a command-line utility and Go package for load testing and benchmarking gRPC services.
source_facts.description says it is a simple gRPC benchmarking and load testing tool.
display_name_sources: Official ghz.sh documentation and GitHub repository use ghz.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is an official documentation fallback.
Official ghz.sh guide provides introduction, installation, usage, and options reference.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/bojand/ghz; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official ghz docs describe gRPC performance testing and Go package usage.
source_facts.description says gRPC benchmarking and load testing.
